title: MagiK
description: Magic modpack that add some "magic" to your game
body:
# **Description**
MagiK it's a modpack that provides a magical experience on your minecraft worlds.
Adds new: 
- ***Biomes***
- ***Dimensions***
- ***Weapons***
- ***Armours***
- ***Ores*** 
- ***Mobs***
- ***MAGIC***

Without forgetting the performance since its based on [AselElisian's PEN+ modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/penplus) so you can play on low end setups!

---
# **Outside modrinth Mod's and API's**
- [Sophisticated Backpacks](https://legacy.curseforge.com/members/p3pp3rf1y/projects) and the API [Sophisticated Core](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sophisticated-core) both made by **P3pp3rF1y**
- [Apothic Attributes](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/apothic-attributes) and the API [Placebo](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/placebo) both made by **Shadows_of_Fire** 
- [Alex's Mobs](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/alexs-mobs) and the API [Citadel](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/citadel) both made by **sbom_xela**
- [Useless Sword](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/useless-sword) by **Furti_Two**
- [Epic Samurai's](https://legacy.curseforge.com/members/vpixelstudio/projects) by **VPixelStudio**
- [ATO - All the Ores](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ato) by  **ATMTeam**
- [The Age of Ores (Crystalcraft Unlimited Java edition)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-age-of-ores-crystalcraft-unlimited-java) by **Lcs128x**

---
# **FAQ**
>- Q: Why should I download your modpack?
>- A: I think that you should download it if you wanna a different experience from Vanilla minecraft

>- Q: Will you update this modpack?
>- A: Probably

>- Q: Can I use your modpack Icon?
>- A: ...[Yes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/COdnBSlS/images/23f58a2542924748533e9da764203f021d7a95ba.png)
